item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description: - Added a public macOS download page with stable/beta channel switching, Apple Silicon/Intel selection, direct GitHub release downloads, and matching Homebrew install commands. - Refreshed project marketing across the download page, README, and GitHub metadata to describe Docktor as customizable Dock click, double-click, and scroll actions, including the shipped default of double click opening App Exposé to show an app's open windows. - Updated the download page branding so stable/beta copy, icon swapping, and icon-derived accent colors stay aligned with the selected channel.
